name: Stop Recorder
command:
#!/bin/bash
# Find the recorder job directory (has stop_signal mechanism)
RECORDER_DIR=$(find ~/PAPR/jobs/*/data -name "current_meeting.txt" -exec dirname {} \; 2>/dev/null | head -1)
if [ -z "$RECORDER_DIR" ]; then
  # Fallback: find any job dir with a recorder binary
  RECORDER_DIR=$(find ~/PAPR/jobs/*/recorder -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs dirname)/data
fi
touch "$RECORDER_DIR/stop_signal" && echo "Stop signal sent"
